daily.today_energy: Your mind is bouncing between ideas like a pinball machine, and honestly? That's your superpower today. Channel that restless energy into creative projects that need fresh perspective. The universe is giving you permission to be a little chaotic.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, deep convos are calling. If you're single, someone's been noticing you from afar—maybe it's time to vibe with new people. Either way, authenticity is your love language rn. Keep it real and watch what unfolds.
daily.career: Your communication skills are *chef's kiss* today. Whether it's pitching an idea, networking, or clarifying something that's been fuzzy, you're the main character in every conversation. Trust your instincts when it comes to professional moves.
daily.health: Your nervous system might feel a bit overstimulated—all those thoughts racing can drain your battery. Ground yourself with something tactile: journaling, a walk, or just touching grass. Your body's asking for a little mindfulness, not a miracle.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is asking you to slow down and actually listen to what people are saying instead of already planning your response. Mercury's got your back, but the real magic happens when you practice presence over performance.
weekly.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, this is a week to be honest about what you actually want versus what sounds good on paper. Someone might surprise you with genuine effort—notice it.
weekly.career: Your ideas are valuable, but timing matters more than you think. Before pitching that thing, vibe-check the room first. Small moves this week set up bigger momentum later.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for consistency over intensity right now. Skip the extreme stuff and lean into what actually feels sustainable. Rest isn't lazy, it's strategic.
